race.comment: THE LITTLE GENERAL (3) is a progressive three-year-old trained by Gai and Adrian who looks to be in for his best prep to date. Returned from a 27-week spell with a dogged all-the-way win over this distance at Hawkesbury last start. Should bounce straight to the lead and dictate terms. Big chance to score again in a moderate race by midweek metro standards. POWERFUL TUNE (10) went straight to the front then defied all challengers to salute last time out over today's trip at Gosford. Has won both races when allowed to dictate. Has a tougher assignment today but is a chance again with the light weight. ROYAL AIR FORCE (2) struggled over 1200m here a fortnight ago in heavy conditions. Form in two runs this prep prior to that had plenty of merit. Can bounce back on a better track. PAZYRYK (9) didn't finish off as hoped at Gosford recently over today's journey. Might be worth another chance on a drying track. RASKOL (5) wasn't too far away last time and should give a good account.
